items.question: How do I connect my social networks?
items.answer: It's simple! After creating your account, go to Settings > Connect Platforms and follow the authentication instructions for each social network.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Yes! We use end-to-end encryption and follow industry best practices for security. We never store your passwords.

items.question: Can I upload videos to multiple platforms at the same time?
items.answer: Yes! With our batch upload feature, you can send videos to multiple platforms simultaneously with custom metadata.

items.question: What is the support response time?
items.answer: Our support responds within 24 hours for Professional plans and within 1 hour for Enterprise plans.

items.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.answer: Yes! You can cancel your subscription anytime without penalties. Your data will remain accessible for 30 days.

items.question: Do you offer integration with external tools?
items.answer: Yes! We offer API and integrations with popular tools like Zapier, Make and other automation platforms.
